visual_description: A man in a suit and tie is seated in the driver’s seat of a vehicle, looking toward the camera with his head slightly tilted. The camera pans to the rear of the vehicle, showing a red taillight and part of a bicycle wheel attached to the back. The background features a painted or stylized landscape with trees and sky visible through the window.
audio_description: The audio clip begins with a burst of high-energy, professionally produced rock music, immediately immersing the listener in a dense, reverberant soundscape. The instrumentation features a full band: a distorted electric guitar plays a driving, palm-muted riff in the left channel, while a second guitar, panned right, delivers a melodic lead line. The bass guitar anchors the center, providing a solid low-end foundation, and the drums—kick, snare, and cymbals—create a relentless, four-on-the-floor rhythm. The mix is wide and immersive, with each instrument occupying a distinct space in the stereo field. A male vocalist, singing in a clear, high tenor with a slight rasp, enters with the lyric, "Be coming down." His delivery is urgent and forceful, with a pronounced American accent and a melodic, anthemic style reminiscent of late-1990s to early-2000s alternative rock. The vocals are processed with heavy reverb and delay, blending seamlessly into the instrumental backdrop.
